name: @agent-corp/vault-web
description: Vault — human operator surface. Vite + a single global React (UMD) + vendored Helm design system. Instrument archetype (dark-only, compact). The console can CREATE and DESTROY authority but can NEVER read a secret back, and never false-greens seal/audit health. Two views, one state: this UI is a sibling of the near-empty MCP surface over the same wrapper store + engine (the extra power is scope: vault:manage).
